column8: FSM 10 states reimplemented atop port frontend helpers; preserves state transitions/sfx ids/return-screen logic; surface blits replaced by D3D11 quad submission (per ARCH-DIVERGENCE: ScreenFSM)
port preserves 4x16 grid math + 0x22/0x26 width overrides + glyph 8x12; replaces orig texture-page binding with td5_asset_find_atlas_entry + GDI fallback for tpage5
port preserves printf -> char remap via s_char_remap -> per-glyph quad build with cursor_x advance + center offset; orig BuildSpriteQuadTemplate D3D3 ring replaced by hud_build_quad D3D11 stream

orig walks g_hudGlyphQueueBuf with stride 0xB8 calling SubmitImmediateTranslucentPrimitive then resets count; port td5_hud_flush_text iterates s_text_quad_buf with TD5_HUD_GLYPH_QUAD_SIZE stride calling hud_submit_quad then zeros count

orig DirectInput 5/7 with 4-effect creation (3x constant force + 1 spring/condition) via vtable; port td5_input_ff_init -> td5_plat_ff_init creates same 4 slots via DI8 (slots 0/2 X-axis ConstForce dir=0, slot 1 Y-axis dir=9000, slot 3 periodic)
